pets.description: A white-and-blue chibi plush Codex desktop pet with black round ear buns.
notes: Generated with OpenAI's hatch-pet workflow from front and side plush character references.
running-left was derived by mirroring running-right to preserve gait consistency.

pets.description: A white-and-blue chibi plush Codex desktop pet wearing sunglasses.
notes: Generated with OpenAI's hatch-pet workflow from a plush character reference wearing sunglasses.
running-left was derived by mirroring running-right to preserve gait consistency.
waving was regenerated after review to make the greeting motion clearer.
